nasb.text: “When an ox or a sheep or a goat is born, it shall remain seven days with its mother, and from the eighth day on it shall be accepted as a sacrifice of an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: “When an ox or sheep or goat is born, it shall remain seven days with its mother, and from the eighth day on it shall be acceptable as a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: “公牛或是綿羊或是山羊生下來以後，七天要與牠的母親在一起，從第八天開始，牠就可以蒙悅納，作獻給耶和華火祭的供物。

ccb.text: “刚出生的牛、绵羊或山羊，前七天要与母亲在一起。从第八天起，可以把它们献给我作火祭。
